content.query:
SELECT distinct
cast(GETDATE() as DATE) as ReportDate
,'CPL' as ReportType
,srs.[SourceCode] as Source
,srs.[Descr] as SubSource
,'PBC' as Division
,lds.id as LeadID
,lds.EntryDate
,cst.[FirstName]
,cst.[LastName]
,cst.[Address1]
,cst.[Address2]
,cst.[City]
,cst.[State]
,cst.[Zip]
,cst.[Phone]
,cst.[Email]
,lds.[Productid] as Product
,prd.LongDescr as ProductDescription
,brn.LongName as Market
,dsp.descr as CurrentLeadDisposition
,case 
    when jbs.jsc_id is NULL then 'False'
    when jbs.jsc_id in (3,5) then 'False'
    else 'True'
end as Sold
,'' as AffiliateLeadNumber
,'' as RenuityLeadScore

,cast(0 as bit) as [ApptSet]
,cast('1900-01-01' as DATE) as [AppointmentSetDate]
,cast('1900-01-01' as DATE) as [AppointmentDate]
,cast(0 as bit) as [NetIssue]
,cast(0 as bit) as [Demo]
,cast(0 as money) as [NetSales]
,0 as [JobID]
,'' as [JobStatus]
,cast('1900-01-01' as DATE) as [JobContractDate]

FROM 
[ODS].[LP_PBC_Lds_Leads] lds
left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_srs_SourceSubs] srs
on lds.srs_id = srs.id
left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_dsp_Dispositions] dsp
on lds.dsp_id = dsp.Descr
left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_cst_Customers] cst
on lds.cst_id = cst.id
left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_brn_Branches] brn
on lds.brn_id = brn.id
left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_prd_Products] prd
on lds.ProductID = prd.ProductID
left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_job_Jobs] job
on lds.id = job.lds_id
left join [ODS].[LP_PBC_jbs_JobStatus] jbs
on job.jbs_id = jbs.id
WHERE
datediff(DAY, lds.EntryDate, dbo.fnConvertUTCtoEST (cast(GETDATE() as DATE) )) between 0 and 90
AND srs.Descr IN
(
'BuyerLink',
'MVF',
'Modernize'
)
